legislative_basis: Central Goods and Services Tax Act 2017, Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act 2017, Income Tax Act 1961 (TDS sections), GST Council rate notifications
verification_note: All GST rates, ITC eligibility rules, RCM categories, and TDS rates in this file are sourced from Indian statute and GST Council notifications. Rates are current as of GST Council 53rd Meeting (June 2024). Verify against latest GST Council notifications before use in client advisory as rates are periodically revised.
description: GST treatment rules, RCM categories, inverted-duty sectors, and TDS rates for Indian enterprise spend analysis

itc_ineligible_categories.note: ITC blocked on cars and personal-use vehicles; allowed for goods transport, passenger transport businesses
Canteen, corporate cafeteria spend; ITC blocked unless in specified hospitality business
Construction or renovation of immovable property; ITC blocked
Free perquisites to employees; ITC blocked unless obligatory under law
Insurance on lives of employees (non-statutory); ITC generally blocked

rcm_categories.note: Receiver of GTA service liable to pay GST under RCM; ITC available if transport used for business
Business entity receiving legal services from individual advocate pays GST under RCM
Fees paid to directors who are not employees attract RCM
Man-power supply for security from unregistered vendors falls under RCM
Cab or vehicle hire from non-corporate suppliers; RCM applicable
IGST on import of services under RCM; relevant for cross-border software subscriptions, consulting
Services by way of sponsorship to any body corporate or partnership firm

section_115BAA.note: Optional concessional tax regime; company forfeits certain deductions. Adjust after-tax NPV when client is on 115BAA.
